hero.tagline: AI & UI/UX Software Engineer — open to opportunities

about.summary: Blending AI engineering with thoughtful UI/UX to build products people love to use
bio: Software Engineer focused on AI-powered products and UI/UX engineering. I love working at the intersection of intelligent systems and human-centered design — from LLM-powered features to the interfaces that make them feel effortless. I hold a B.Sc. in Computer Science & Entrepreneurship from Reichman University.

Previously at Voltify, I designed and owned a simulation platform and communication layers for distributed control systems, working with Python, C++, Redis, Modbus, and Docker in a Linux environment — a systems foundation that helps me ship AI products that hold up in production.

On the design side, I craft end-to-end product experiences — research, wireframes, prototypes, and polished UI — using React, Tailwind, and Figma. Selected design work is available in my dedicated UI/UX portfolio.

My journey includes serving as a Combat Soldiers Instructor in the Israeli Air Force and professional experience at the Israeli Consulate in New York, where I handled logistics for high-profile diplomatic operations.
